headline: Your MCP setup saw 27800 proxied calls (25214 blocked). Industry regression gates passed.

sections.title: In plain English
sections.markdown:
### What we observed from your usage
- 27800 tool calls in the last 7 days
- 25214 calls blocked by policy
- Most common block: semantic-path-guard (20598×)
### What we tested
- Swarm gates: 5 passed, 3 failed
- Live filesystem MCP: 6/6 scenarios
- Core regression gates OK
**Common block reasons:** semantic-path-guard; encoding-evasion-guard; timing-enumeration-guard.
**Infrastructure charts:** 28106 proxied calls (25295 blocked, 7d window) · instant learning: 108 block events, 39 suggestions queued.

sections.title: Your MCP servers
bullets: echo-test: probe failed — Expected property name or '}' in JSON at position 1 (line 1 column 2)

items.text: Open regression gate details below and fix failing checks before production.
Re-run analysis weekly or after adding new MCP servers.
